title: Iron's Spells Armor Reimagined
description: Updated armor visuals for Iron’s Spells ’n Spellbooks, featuring enhanced detail and a more cohesive, immersive style in-game
body:
## ![](https://i.imgur.com/ijNCj3E.png) ## ✨ About Tired of the flat, 2D look of armor in **_Iron’s Spells ’n Spellbooks_**? This resource pack reimagines all armor sets with enhanced textures, adding depth, detail, and a more immersive visual experience. P.S. Feel free to include this resource pack in your modpacks! *** ## 🛡️ List of Armor This pack reimagines the following armor sets from **_Iron’s Spells 'n Spellbooks_**: ### 🧥 Armor: * **Pumpkin Armor** * **Wandering Magician Armor** ### 🗡️ All model:
Spoiler

*** ## 🖼️ Gallery _Be sure to check the 'Gallery' tab above to see all the models in action!_ ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1302/506/2025-08-27_00-47-37-png.png) *** ## 🌟 My Other Projects [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1212766/description_0ebf2876-014a-46d4-a68a-bcda90c1a82b.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cataclysm-reimagined) [![](https://i.imgur.com/5Y80O2m.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/irons-spells-weapons-reimagined) *** ## ❓ Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) ❔ Does this pack change gameplay? ✅ **Answer:** No! The pack only updates armor textures without affecting the game or mod. ❔ Is the pack compatible with other resource packs? ✅ **Answer:** Yes! It works well alongside most other packs. ❔ How often will updates be released? ✅ **Answer:** Updates are planned with new mod versions, adding improved textures. *** ## 📜 Credits & Rights * **Original Mod Author:** [Iron431](https://www.curseforge.com/members/iron431/projects) — thanks for the amazing mod! > **⚖️ Rights:** This project is a fan-made resource pack. All rights for the original mod belong to its creator, Iron431. We are simply enhancing its visual presentation.
